author: Tester <t@t.com>
body:
Status update (2026-06-22).

`69d5e1b` (`agent-ready`) closed. `jjf ready` is live: walks
open issues, drops anything blocked by an open dependency,
excludes the roadmap, and sorts by type priority (bug >
feature > research > epic > unspecified) then `created_at`
FIFO. Flags: `--label` (AND), `--type` (OR), `--limit`,
`--json`. Dangling dep ids tolerated (a deleted id can't ever
close, so blocking forever would wedge progress).

Commit `594e257`. 231/231 workspace tests green (was 212;
ten new storage tests + nine new CLI integration tests).

`docs/cli-json.md` has the new `ready` envelope; `CLAUDE.md`
Queries section gains the canonical invocations.

This was the headline primitive this epic exists for. Open
under this epic next: `--claim` (atomic assign-and-go),
`remember`, MCP exposure of `ready` as a tool, and the
stale `subagent-working-a-git-bug-issue` skill rewrite.
